headline: Summit counters PD-1/VEGF skeptics; Celldex drug fails skin disease study
summary: A new analysis could address some doubts investors have had about ivonescimab, one analyst said. Elsewhere, Gilead and Merck debuted data for a once-weekly HIV tablet and a new pyschedelics competitor emerged.

raw.headline: Summit counters PD-1/VEGF skeptics; Celldex drug fails skin disease study

headline: Gilead (GILD) Will Bring New HIV Data And A Merck Regimen To AIDS 2026
summary: Gilead Sciences plans to present new HIV research data at AIDS 2026. The presentations will include long term efficacy and safety results from lenacapavir. Gilead will also share data on a novel HIV treatment regimen developed with Merck. For investors following Gilead Sciences, NasdaqGS:GILD, the announcement connects directly to how the market views the company’s HIV portfolio. The stock recently closed at $130.28, with a return of 7.1% year to date and 21.3% over the past year. Over a 5...
